Defender.description:
Generates 5 Action Points at the start of turn
Generates 35 Action Points when hit
Increases Defense by 15%

Sweeper.description: A combat specialist who waits patiently for an opening.

Phalanx.description: A defensive specialist who stands their ground to protect their allies.

Striker.description:
Generates 5 Action Points on critical hit
Generates 20 Action Points when attacking
Increases Critical Hit Chance by 5%

Attacker.description: A brave warrior who crushes enemies with high attack.

Bruiser.description: A brawler who specializes in prolonged battles with balanced offensive and defensive skills.

Ranger.description: Generates 20 Action Points at the start of turn

Tactician.description: A master strategist who gets the upper hand in battles by granting buffs to allies.

Vanguard.description: A leader who dominates the enemy with high Speed.

Healer.description:
Generates 5 Action Points at the start of turn
Generates 25 Action Points when an ally is hit
Increases Health by 10%

Sage.description: A support specialist who thwarts the enemy's attempts to hamper their allies by granting them various effects.

Reliever.description: A savior who heals allies in moments of peril.

Mage.description:
Generates 5 Action Points at the start of turn
Generates Action Points when using skills
Increases Attack by 10%

Wizard.description: A master of magic who wreaks havoc on the battlefield with powerful spells.

Enchanter.description: A mastermind in battles who weakens ennemies with a variety of additional effects.
